title: Road condition monitoring standard – PAS 2161
body: "Road condition data is used by local highway authorities to monitor, plan and prioritise their highway maintenance activities.  This guidance:   highlights the main points of the standard for road condition monitoring – PAS 2161:2024 specifies how local authorities must fulfil their reporting requirements of road condition data outlines which survey technologies can be used   We published a position paper published in 2021, which outlined the options considered before the development of PAS 2161. "
